subject: Cabba, Universe 6 Saiyan, leaping upward in a battle-ready pose
description: A young humanoid figure leaps or rises upward in a dynamic action pose, one fist pulled back and the other reaching forward. The figure wears a light-colored battle suit with a dark collar or chest piece. The hair is dark and styled upward in an anime fighting aesthetic. Golden energy streams trail from the figure and bright light emanates from behind, suggesting an awakening or breakthrough moment. The background is warm gold and white, with streaking energy lines creating a sense of upward momentum. The expression is intense and determined, conveying a pivotal transformative moment.
foreground: young humanoid in light battle suit, dark hair styled upward, leaping pose, one fist pulled back
background: warm gold and white light with energy streamers
